## Summary

One-line description of the proposal.

## Context

What situation or problem prompted this proposal?

## Proposal

Describe your proposed change or approach.

## Alternatives Considered

What other options did you consider? Why not those?

## Trade-offs

What are the costs or risks of this proposal?
